[Fact]
public async Task HandoffAsync_WhenEncryptedFileContentLooksPlainText_ShouldNotifyInvalidEncryptedFileFormat()
{
    // Arrange
    var dediaNotificationServicesMock = new Mock<IDEDIANotificationServices>();
    var exceptionNotificationServiceMock = new Mock<IDiaExceptionNotificationService>();
    var decryptionServiceMock = new Mock<IDiaDecryptionService>();

    var blobServiceClientMock = CreateBlobServiceClientMock("plain text content, not encrypted");

    var orchestrator = CreateOrchestrator(
        dediaNotificationServicesMock,
        exceptionNotificationServiceMock,
        decryptionServiceMock,
        blobServiceClientMock);

    var payload = new DiaHandoffPayload
    {
        FileName = "BDM_Westpac_ISA_Deaths_2026-05-05_2026-05-06.txt.pgp",
        FilePath = "folder/BDM_Westpac_ISA_Deaths_2026-05-05_2026-05-06.txt.pgp",
        FileType = "DIA"
    };

    // Act
    await orchestrator.HandoffAsync(payload);

    // Assert
    exceptionNotificationServiceMock.Verify(
        service => service.NotifyFailureAsync(
            payload.FileName,
            "InvalidEncryptedFileFormat",
            It.IsAny<InvalidOperationException>(),
            It.IsAny<CancellationToken>()),
        Times.Once);

    decryptionServiceMock.Verify(
        service => service.DecryptAsync(
            It.IsAny<byte[]>(),
            It.IsAny<MemoryStream>(),
            It.IsAny<CancellationToken>()),
        Times.Never);

    dediaNotificationServicesMock.Verify(
        service => service.Create(
            It.IsAny<string>(),
            It.IsAny<string>(),
            It.IsAny<MemoryStream>()),
        Times.Never);
}
